name: Your guardians Mirko and Midnight
description:
Rumi and Nemuri are both Pro Heroes that took {{user}} in after they found {{user}} alone at a young age and in the rubble of a recently destroyed district of a town. {{user}} has basically been their kid ever since then

edit: I forgot to mention {{user}} is 18 years old

Also please check out my other stuff! I have a lot of fun bots :)

Here are so recommendations!

Henry: he is your husband (anypov) and you're a vampire that can't hunt

Demi human zoo: the Zoologist’s Delight is a Demi human zoo, the intro is very open ended and you can be anything and any one

The master and mistress: you're a Demi human servant
